name: Barbecued Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast on all sides in hot oil in a large roaster.
2. Add onions and garlic to the roaster.
3. Combine remaining ingredients and pour over the roast.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 2 hours.
5. If desired, add small peeled potatoes around the roast.
6. Return to oven and continue cooking an additional hour or until the roast is tender.
